title: 2. Expand each node recursively via research prompts:
content:
2. Expand each node recursively via research prompts:
- Aesthetic Rules
- Symbolic Lineage
- Output Potential
- Cultural Anchors
- Emotional and Ritual Logic
3. Classify and tag each entity by:
- Logic System (Dream/Reality/Hybrid)
- Artistic POV
- Commercial Format
- Educational Role
4. Draft connected modules:
- Living Archive Index
- Field of Study + Syllabi
- Modular Readmes and Profiles
- Translation Engines (syntax, glyph, narrative)

---

### PHASE 3B: WHY WE EXPAND FIRST

Before publishing any final documents:
- We will deepen the layers by integrating:
- Comparative Systems (e.g., Campbell, Jung, Guattari)
- Media Architecture (e.g., Pixar, Valve, Lucasfilm)
